blended.narrative: Cypress Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 37 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
